use_cases: Showcasing creative projects with animated sketchbook-style reveals on scroll
Feature highlight cards that draw into view on landing pages
Portfolio section with hand-drawn border aesthetics and path animations
Onboarding tutorials that reveal content through SVG stroke animations
Interactive gallery cards with wobble filter distortion effects
ai_summary: A scroll-triggered card component with a hand-drawn sketchbook aesthetic featuring SVG path stroke animations that draw into view. The card uses a wobble filter for organic distortion and reveals content with smooth stroke-dashoffset transitions. Ideal for creative portfolios, landing page sections, or anywhere a playful illustration-style card with reveal animations is needed.
